properties.Title: YouTube Premium Optimization Strategy - Duo Plan Analysis for French Users

text.content: Executive Summary

rich_text.plain_text: Executive Summary

text.content: Comprehensive analysis to optimize YouTube Premium costs for 2 users across multiple countries (CH, FR, IT, UK, DE). Discovered that student discount conversion in July 2025 made French Duo Plan (€19.99/month) the optimal choice over individual student subscriptions ($27.98/month). Provided configuration guide for accessing French market pricing.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Comprehensive analysis to optimize YouTube Premium costs for 2 users across multiple countries (CH, FR, IT, UK, DE). Discovered that student discount conversion in July 2025 made French Duo Plan (€19.99/month) the optimal choice over individual student subscriptions ($27.98/month). Provided configuration guide for accessing French market pricing.


## Context & Intent

User sought to minimize YouTube Premium subscription costs for 2 people, leveraging multiple country residencies, credit cards, and a potential student email from Glendale. Needed ad-free YouTube access with optimal cost structure.


## What Was Done

Analyzed YouTube Premium pricing across 5 countries, evaluated student discount eligibility, compared Duo Plan availability, assessed VPN risks, calculated cost comparisons post-student conversion, and provided France localization guide.


## Outputs Produced

- [analysis] Multi-country pricing comparison — Comprehensive breakdown of YouTube Premium costs across CH, FR, IT, UK, DE
- [recommendation] Optimal subscription strategy — French Duo Plan at €19.99/month identified as best option
- [guide] Google account France configuration — Step-by-step process to access French pricing through proper localization

## Key Decisions & Validations

- French Duo Plan selected as optimal strategy over student discounts
- VPN arbitrage rejected due to high detection risks
- Multi-country legal residence leveraged for legitimate geographic pricing

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Multi-country residence provides legitimate pricing options
- Date awareness critical for accurate analysis
- French Duo Plan offers 23% savings over converted student plans
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial analysis missed July 2025 student conversion deadline
- Student discount strategy no longer viable post-conversion
Discoveries:

- YouTube Premium Duo Plan availability varies significantly by country
- Student plan conversions create pricing disadvantages
- Legal multi-country access provides better options than VPN risks

## Challenges & Blockers

- Duo Plan visibility limited to eligible regions
- Account localization required for proper pricing access
- Student discount conversion eliminated previous cost advantage

## Open Questions

- Will Duo Plan expand to other countries in user's portfolio
- Long-term pricing stability of French Duo Plan
- Alternative optimization strategies if Duo Plan access fails

## Next Steps

- Configure Google account for France localization
- Test access to French Duo Plan pricing
- Implement subscription using French address and payment method
- Monitor for plan availability changes across other countries
---
UID: pzn1hifgfMbo5QNxnKikN5 | Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 | Cost: $0.0219
